comment.body:
---

**📆 \$SPX Daily Plan – Wednesday, May 21**
**Theme:** VIX unwind, vol compression, and whale put tail risk

---

**📌 CONTEXT**
Around 2:00 PM, SPX started selling off as VIX popped — a textbook VIXpiration unwind.
• Over 20,000 VIX puts closed in large blocks → unclenching synthetic pressure
• VIX jumped above 18.00 → SPX dumped \~30 pts to 5909
• By 3:00 PM, dealer adjustments complete → SPX bounced back to 5940 where it started
• Late session: whale bought >10K 5875 puts (1DTE) for Wed, May 21 — VWAP was approx 4.00 at time of trade → could be directional, hedge, or a vol play into post-VIX expiry

**Key Takeaway:**
• Watch for VIXpiration ‘2.0’ effects after Wed S.O.Q. settlement — second wave of positioning shakeout possible
• IF IV spikes → 5875 puts could flip dangerous fast as dealers rehedge into pressure

---

**📊 Levels / EM / Clusters / Misc.**
• 5875 = HUGE level → >13K puts bought late Tuesday (\~4.00 VWAP, now 11.50 ask / \~35 delta)
• Do they close? Or press it?
• 5865 / 5970 = 5-day range
• WTD range = 5895 / 5970
• Straddle EM ≈ 40 → projected range: 5855 – 5935

**Key Clusters:**
• 5850, 5875, 5900, 5935/50, 5960, 5975, 6000 (deep OTM)

---

**🧭 \$SPX 0DTE Heat Map Road Map – Wed. May 21**
Spot ≈ 5895 | Straddle: ±40 → EM range: 5855–5935

---

**CHOP ZONE: 5890–5940**
• 5900 = center of gravity
• 5910/15 = pivot shelf → chop magnet, expect noise
• 5935/40 = chop ceiling → sellers likely on first touch
• Inside zone = two-way flow, dealer hedging dominates

---

**IF ABOVE CHOP (5940+) THEN → 5955 → 5975**
• 5955 = first resistance band
• 5975 = thin zone → fast move risk
• IF > 5975 THEN → 6000 (light long call interest)
• THEN → 6015/20 = gamma ceiling → likely stall/fade zone

---

**IF WITHIN CHOP (5890–5940)**
• 5900 = magnet / balance point
• 5910–5935 = micro fade levels
• Watch for failed breakouts and IV-driven swings
• Dealer pinning potential if vol stays compressed

---

**IF BELOW CHOP (5890-) THEN → 5880 → 5870**
• **5875/80 = gamma shelf → large reaction zone**
• 5870 = edge of structure → breach risks downside acceleration
• IF < 5870 THEN → 5850 = gamma slip line → unlocks lower speed zone

---

**⚠️ LANDMINE ZONE @ 5875**
• Massive customer long puts vs dealer shorts
• Delta still elevated → sharp vol spike could activate
• Charm decay sets stage for reversal if flushed and reclaimed
• Dangerous zone → either magnet on weakness or springboard if vol fades

---

**SUMMARY ZONES**

**⬆️ ABOVE CHOP**
• 5940–5955 = fade zone
• 5955–5975 = thin / fast tape
• 6000–6020 = exhaustion shelf

**🔁 WITHIN CHOP**
• 5890–5940 = gravity-bound
• 5900 = control center
• 5910–5935 = back-and-forth traps

**⬇️ BELOW CHOP**
• **5875/80 = gamma shelf**
• 5850 = gamma trigger
• 5875 = ⚠️ landmine (put-heavy zone)

---

**🧠 Additional Considerations**
• VIXpery / S.O.Q. at the open can create instability (especially with -GEX at 5875)
• Overwrite ETFs feeding upside dealer short gamma
• Vol-selling systematics = local dealer long gamma → adds compression

---
